lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਅਪੁਨੈ ਨਾਇ ਲਾਏ ਸਰਬ ਸੂਖ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੁਮਰੀ ਰਜਾਇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa apunai naae laae sarab sookh prabh tumaree rajaae | rahaau |
lines.english: Bestowing Your Mercy, God, You attach us to Your Name; all peace comes by Your Will. ||Pause||
The Lord is Ever-present; one who deems Him to be far away,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਦੀਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਚਿਤਵਤ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jin sabh kichh deea tis chitavat naeh |
lines.english: The mortals do not remember the One, who has given them everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਮਰਤਾ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਝੂਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: so jan marataa nit nit jhoor |2|
lines.english: Dies again and again, repenting. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਮਹਿ ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਨਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mahaa bikhiaa meh din rain jaeh |3|
lines.english: Engrossed in such terrible corruption, their days and nights waste away. ||3||
Says Nanak, meditate in remembrance of the One Lord God.
Salvation is obtained, in the Shelter of the Perfect Guru. ||4||3||97||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
All sins and sorrows are washed away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸਭੁ ਹਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: naam japat man tan sabh hariaa |
lines.english: Meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the mind and body are totally rejuvenated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਇ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaae param gat paaee | rahaau |
lines.english: when the Glorious Praises of the Lord are sung, and the supreme status is obtained. ||Pause||
Worshipping the feet of the Holy Saints,
How blessed is that day, O my Siblings of Destiny,
troubles and hatred are eliminated from the mind. ||2||
and the five demons are totally subdued. ||3||
Meeting with the Perfect Guru, conflict is ended,
O Nanak - I am a sacrifice to him. ||4||4||98||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis man vasiaa har kaa naam |
lines.english: One whose mind is filled with the Name of the Lord,
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
who is the Support of the soul, the body and the breath of life.
O singer, sing of the One,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰ ਕਾਹੂ ਪਹਿ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਜਾਵਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: avar kaahoo peh bahurr na jaaveh |1|
lines.english: You shall no longer go to any other. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee sevaa sarab sukh paaveh |
lines.english: Serving Him, all peace is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਸੰਤ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਾਸੀਐ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: balihaaree tis sant piaare jis prasaad prabh man vaaseeai | rahaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to the Beloved Saints; by their kind favor, God comes to dwell in the mind. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦ ਅਨੰਦੀ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਗੁਨ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਜਾਪੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa anand anandee saahib gun nidhaan nit nit jaapeeai |
lines.english: My Blissful Lord Master is forever in bliss; meditate continually and forever, on the Lord, the treasure of excellence.
His gifts are never exhausted.
In His subtle way, He easily absorbs all.
So enshrine that True Lord within your mind. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਬਖਸ ਨ ਮੇਟੈ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee bakhas na mettai koee |
lines.english: His benevolence cannot be erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਸਮਗ੍ਰੀ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਪੂਰਨ ॥
lines.translit: sagal samagree grih jaa kai pooran |
lines.english: His house is filled with all sorts of articles;
Holding to His Support, the state of fearless dignity is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸੋ ਗੁਨ ਨਿਧਿ ਗਾਈਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saas saas so gun nidh gaaeeai |3|
lines.english: With each and every breath, sing of the Lord, the treasure of excellence. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਦੂਖ ਨ ਝੂਰਨ ॥
lines.translit: prabh ke sevak dookh na jhooran |
lines.english: God's servants never suffer pain.
He is not far from us, wherever we go.
I offer this prayer to the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: nadar kare taa har har paaeeai |
lines.english: When He shows His Mercy, we obtain the Lord, Har, Har.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
Nanak begs for the treasure of the Lord's Name. ||4||5||99||
First, the pains of the body vanish;

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਉ ਜਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bal bal tis satigur kau jaau |1|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice to that True Guru. ||1||
In His Mercy, the Guru bestows the Lord's Name.
then, the mind becomes totally peaceful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਗ ਸੋਗ ਸਭ ਦੂਖ ਬਿਨਾਸੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: rog sog sabh dookh binaase satigur kee saranaaee | rahaau |
lines.english: All illness, sorrows and sufferings are dispelled, in the Sanctuary of the True Guru. ||Pause||
I have obtained the Perfect Guru, O my Siblings of Destiny.
Showering His Mercy, the Guru has given this gift. ||2||
The fire is extinguished, and I am totally peaceful.
The feet of the Guru abide within my heart;
I have received all the fruits of my heart's desires.
The Guru has given honor to the dishonored.
Shattering his bonds, the Guru has saved His servant.
The Guru has given shelter to the shelterless.
I taste with my tongue the Ambrosial Bani of His Word. ||3||
Forsaking everything, I have obtained God's Sanctuary.
By great good fortune, I worship the Guru's feet.
